message:
fix(connector-bundles): remove unused import and fix severity_to_level signature

- Remove unused ConnectorLifecyclePhase import
- Pass CanonicalSeverity by value (Copy type) to severity_to_level
- Add SchemaVersion import to test module for sample_event helper
- All 59 unit tests passing
